violations.description: Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a self closing door.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Ceiling above ice cream is not constructed or designed to be smooth, and easily cleanable. Ceiling is popcorned. Mop board finish installing around 3-comp sink and finish the rest of the flooring.
Lighting. — --Light shields did not have protective covering above food prep area.
